title: SubscriptionBalanceContract
description:
Represents the balance for all alert subscriptions associated with the user acount, including remaining credits and timestamps
for the most recent refill and deduction operations.

creditsRemaining.description: Alert credits remaining for the account.

lastRefilledUtc.description: The datetime when the balance was last re-filled, in UTC.

lastDeductedUtc.description:
The datetime when the balance was last deducated, in UTC.
Deduction typically occurs when an alert notification was dispatched
for one of the alert subscriptions associated with the user account.
